verdicts.rationale: Matches analysis.findings ruleId=hygiene:oos-noindexed exactly (count=2, pctOfPages=13.3, affectedUrls saisonale-edition and limited-drop); gemessen is justified for the measured count/URLs and no numbers beyond the analysis are introduced.

Matches ruleId=schema:offer-no-price exactly (count=4, pctOfPages=26.7, the four affectedUrls geschenkbox/abo-box/probierset/kapseln); gemessen is correct for the measured count, and the embedded 'Beobachtet' aside about bundle/abo/sampler products is explicitly self-labeled as an observation (drawn from the very URL slugs in affectedUrls) rather than asserted as measured, so it is not an over-claim.

Matches ruleId=schema:product-no-aggregate exactly (count=9, pctOfPages=60, cited URLs are a subset of the 9 affectedUrls); gemessen fits the measured count, and the recommendation correctly gates aggregateRating on real reviews existing, honoring the anti-overclaim caveat with no fabricated numbers.

Matches ruleId=schema:organization-logo exactly (count=1, affectedUrls=["https://example-shop.test/"]); gemessen is correct for the measured single instance, and the finding explicitly avoids misreading pctOfPages=6.7 as a site-wide share.
Matches ruleId=onpage:title-dup exactly (count=6, pctOfPages=40, all six affectedUrls cited); gemessen is correct for the measured duplicate-title count with no fabricated numbers.
Matches ruleId=onpage:alt-missing exactly (count=8, pctOfPages=53.3, cited URLs are a subset of the 8 affectedUrls); gemessen is correct for the measured count with no fabricated numbers.
